name: Mandelic Acid
description: A gentle alpha-hydroxy acid derived from bitter almonds, ideal for sensitive skin wanting exfoliation.
scientificSummary: Larger molecular size than glycolic acid means slower skin penetration and reduced irritation potential on sensitive skin.
mechanismOfAction: Loosens desmosomes between corneocytes to accelerate cell turnover and reveal brighter, smoother skin underneath.

seo.title: Mandelic Acid - Gentle AHA Exfoliant | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Mandelic Acid provides effective exfoliation with minimal irritation for sensitive skin types.
